title: 2023年度 第2回検定一次試験 英検4級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you want a drink from the convenience store?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どんな飲み物がいい？」に1の「コーラ1本」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「コーラ1本」→正解。2「カバンの中」→無関係。3「バイト」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's wash the dog after breakfast.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can you get some towels and the dog shampoo?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「タオルとシャンプー持ってきて」に1の「はい、できます」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「できます」→正解。2「お腹空いてない」→無関係。3「5歳だよ」→無関係。

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: I want to go one day.
questions.explanation: 「買ったの？」に3の「いいえ、プレゼントだった」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「いつか行きたい」→無関係。2「一緒に勉強した」→無関係。3「プレゼント」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Will you take a trip this summer?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どこに住んでる？」に2の「バンクーバー」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「3週間」→場所を聞いている。2「バンクーバー」→正解。3「飛行機で」→場所を聞いている。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I drew this picture for Grandma.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: When can I give it to her?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「いつあげられる？」に2の「日曜の午後」が適切。
highlights: When can I give it to her
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「早すぎる」→時期の答えでない。2「日曜の午後」→正解。3「先月」→過去。

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「あまり」に3の「じゃあぶどうはどう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「確認して」→無関係。2「作るよ」→無関係。3「ぶどうはどう」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My dad made this fried chicken for me.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「大好き」に2の「おいしそう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「お金ない」→無関係。2「おいしそう」→正解。3「料理できる」→無関係。

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Sure, I'll call you back later.
questions.explanation: 「今晩話せる？」に1の「後でかけ直す」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「後でかけ直す」→正解。2「どういたしまして」→無関係。3「残念」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How many fish did you catch?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何匹釣った？」に3の「3匹だけ」が適切。
highlights: How many fish did you catch
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ほぼ1日」→数を聞いている。2「いいえ」→無関係。3「3匹だけ」→正解。

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「靴どこ？」に1の「玄関の近く」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「玄関の近く」→正解。2「朝に」→場所を聞いている。3「黒い」→場所を聞いている。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Excuse me. I'm looking for a dictionary.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: They're on the first floor, near the magazines.

questions.question: What is the man looking for?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「雑誌」→辞書。2「辞書」→正解。3「教科書」→辞書。4「小説」→辞書。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Wendy, did you put your lunchbox in your bag?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Great. Did you close the window in your room, too?

questions.question: What will Wendy do next?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「弁当を詰める」→もうした。2「学校に行く」→窓閉める。3「窓を閉める」→正解。4「部屋を掃除」→窓を閉める。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's go to the movies tomorrow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, to the airport to meet a friend from Japan.

questions.question: Where will the girl go tomorrow?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「映画」→行けない。2「レストラン」→空港。3「学校」→空港。4「空港」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Usually two dollars, but today they're on sale for one dollar each.

questions.question: How much are doughnuts today?
highlights: on sale for one dollar each
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1ドル」→正解。2「2ドル」→通常価格。3「3ドル」→言及なし。4「5ドル」→個数。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you watch TV last night, Tony?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, I didn't. I went to bed at eight o'clock.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Why did you go to bed so early?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I had soccer practice after school, and I was very tired.

questions.question: Why did Tony go to bed at eight o'clock?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「疲れていた」→正解。2「テレビを見る」→見てない。3「宿題終わった」→言及なし。4「読みたかった」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I had dinner at an Italian restaurant, too.

questions.question: What are they talking about?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「新しいレストラン」→誕生日。2「ギターレッスン」→もらった。3「男の子の誕生日」→正解。4「女の子のプレゼント」→男の子の。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, I'll help at my parents' restaurant.

questions.question: What will the woman do today?
questions.explanation: 「両親のレストランを手伝う」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「コーヒー」→断った。2「レストランを手伝う」→正解。3「買い物」→言及なし。4「両親を訪ねる」→手伝う。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you want some strawberry pancakes?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. I'll buy some butter, then.

questions.question: What will the woman buy?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「苺」→バター。2「ブルーベリー」→バター。3「バター」→正解。4「パンケーキミックス」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Jill, will you go to the music festival?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, I'll go with my sister. What about you, Frank?

questions.question: Who will buy a ticket today?
questions.explanation: 「フランクがチケットを買う」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「フランク」→正解。2「ジル」→姉妹と行く。3「ジルの姉妹」→言及なし。4「フランクの姉妹」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Two weeks ago. I was there for a year.

questions.question: When did the girl come back from Australia?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「2週間前」→正解。2「2ヶ月前」→2週間。3「去年」→2週間前。4「昨夏」→2週間前。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm going to go to Europe next year. I'll stay in France for two weeks and Germany for one week. Then, I'll go to Spain for five days.

questions.question: How long will the woman stay in France?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「5日」→スペイン。2「1週間」→ドイツ。3「2週間」→正解。4「3週間」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My family went on a trip to the beach last week. We went by car because we took our dog.

questions.question: What is the boy talking about?
highlights: My family went on a trip
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「新しい車」→旅行。2「家族旅行」→正解。3「ペットの犬」→旅行。4「ビーチパーティ」→旅行。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: On Saturday, Jim played baseball in the park with his friends. He found a bag on a bench, so he took it to the police station.

questions.question: Why did Jim go to the police station?
questions.explanation: 「カバンを見つけたので交番に届けた」。
highlights: took it to the police station
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「カバンを見つけた」→正解。2「カバンをなくした」→見つけた。3「野球がしたい」→公園で。4「友達に会った」→公園で。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My science homework was really hard, so I asked my brother for help. He was busy. My mother wasn't home, but my father helped me.

questions.question: Who helped the girl with her homework?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「兄弟」→忙しかった。2「先生」→言及なし。3「母」→不在。4「父」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Now for the weather. This afternoon will be cold and rainy. It won't rain tonight, but it will be windy. Tomorrow morning, it will be sunny.

questions.question: When will it be rainy?
highlights: This afternoon will be cold and rainy
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今日の午後」→正解。2「今夜」→雨は降らない。3「明日の朝」→晴れ。4「明日の午後」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I went to the zoo with my sister yesterday. We saw some pandas. They ate and played outside. I took pictures of my sister with the animals.

questions.question: What did the boy do yesterday?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「犬と遊んだ」→動物園。2「学校に行った」→動物園。3「動物園に行った」→正解。4「家にいた」→動物園。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Jeff went to the store yesterday. There was no beef, so he bought chicken. Today, he made chicken curry.

questions.question: What did Jeff buy yesterday?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「牛肉」→なかった。2「カレー」→今日作った。3「鶏肉」→正解。4「米」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Welcome to Hilltop Department Store. Men's and women's clothes are on the first floor, and children's clothes are on the second floor. Have a great day!

questions.question: What can people buy on the second floor?
highlights: children's clothes are on the second floor
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「子供服」→正解。2「紳士服」→1階。3「婦人服」→1階。4「靴」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Tom's friends will go to a baseball game today. Tom can't go to it because he will go on a camping trip.

questions.question: What will Tom do today?
highlights: he will go on a camping trip
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「野球」→友達が行く。2「映画」→言及なし。3「友達を訪ねる」→キャンプ。4「キャンプ」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Attention, please. Greenlake Supermarket will close at 9:30 tonight. The café will be open until 9:15. We will open tomorrow morning at 8:15.

questions.question: What time will Greenlake Supermarket open tomorrow?
